name: Prompt Optimizer Router
description: Detect prompt-optimizer trigger phrases in ordinary OpenClaw chats, bridge the turn to a temporary specialist session, and inject the result back into the host chat.

skillFile.description: Path to the canonical SKILL.md prompt file.

specialistAgentId.description: Agent id used to process routed prompt-optimizer turns.

specialistThinking.description: Thinking level used only for routed specialist turns.

specialistTimeoutMs.description: Maximum wait time for the specialist turn before injecting a failure note.

enabledAgentIds.description: Optional allowlist of host agent IDs that should accept prompt-optimizer trigger routing. Empty means all agents except prompt_optimizer itself.
